name: Detect It Easy
description: Determines file types, packers and compilers. Tool: https://github.com/horsicq/Detect-It-Easy. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #122 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Detect It Easy output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Detect It Easy output file to parse instead of running it live.
